name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

look for bad syslog entries

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
17a18,27
> Oct 23 19:25:05 3e63b436fdbe rc[692059]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
